assertions.title: Desktop home shows three first-class modes

steps.action: Open the app on desktop viewport
steps.expected: Home shows Solo, TV Display, and Multiplayer together above the fold
steps.observed: All three labeled mode cards were visible simultaneously on initial load

steps.expected: The three CTAs remain present in one initial home state
steps.observed: Snapshot and annotated screenshot both showed Solo, TV Display, and Multiplayer in the initial home view

evidence.snapshot: Initial snapshot exposed three pressed/visible mode cards: Solo, TV Display, Multiplayer.

assertions.title: Pre-game home hides in-round gameplay UI

steps.action: Inspect initial home state before starting a round
steps.expected: No active in-round board, scoring, or results UI competes with setup
steps.observed: Home showed setup content with disabled word entry, no active board, no scorekeeping pane, and no revealed results

evidence.snapshot: Body text stated 'No board, score, word entry, or results state appears before play begins' and only pre-start controls were interactive.

assertions.title: Home setup controls update visible state and URL

steps.action: Change language from Polski to English and increase timer twice
steps.expected: Visible setup state and URL query update together without leaving home
steps.observed: Visible labels changed to English and 3 min, and the URL updated to ?lang=eng&t=180&mode=solo

evidence.snapshot: Updated page text showed Language: English and Timer: 3 min while still on the home/setup surface.

steps.action: Click +1 min repeatedly past the supported maximum
steps.expected: Timer clamps at the max instead of exceeding it
steps.observed: Timer stopped at 10 min and URL stopped at t=600

steps.action: Click -1 min repeatedly past the supported minimum
steps.expected: Timer clamps at the min instead of going below it
steps.observed: Timer stopped at 1 min and URL stopped at t=60

evidence.snapshot: Visible timer text clamped at 10 min / 10:00 and 1 min / 01:00 with matching query-string values.

assertions.title: Solo mode enters a playable solo round cleanly

steps.action: Start a solo round from the home/setup surface
steps.expected: A live solo round appears with board, timer, and solo controls
steps.observed: The board rendered, countdown began at 00:58 after load, word entry and Add word became enabled, and Reveal/Restart controls appeared

steps.expected: Home mode-selection UI should no longer compete for attention
steps.observed: Interactive snapshot showed only solo controls; Solo/TV/Multiplayer mode cards were no longer interactive in live play

evidence.snapshot: Live snapshot exposed only Language, timer adjusters, Word entry, Add word, Reveal words, and Restart round alongside board letters.

assertions.title: Direct setup URL restores home selections without auto-start

steps.expected: Home/setup surface restores selections and does not auto-start play
steps.observed: Home opened with Русский selected, timer at 5 min, all three mode CTAs visible, and the round remained in pre-start state with disabled entry

evidence.snapshot: Snapshot showed the restored home setup plus visible Solo / TV Display / Multiplayer buttons and a disabled Word entry textbox.

assertions.title: Pre-start settings update visible state without starting a round

steps.action: Stay on solo pre-start and change persisted settings before play
steps.expected: Visible setup updates and URL stays in sync without auto-starting a round
steps.observed: Solo pre-start reflected English and 3 min while staying in pre-start with disabled entry and start CTA still required

evidence.snapshot: Pre-start solo remained visible with disabled Word entry and Start solo round after settings changed.

assertions.title: Solo surface is isolated from multiplayer chrome

steps.action: Inspect solo live play after starting a round
steps.expected: Multiplayer join fields, host/join panels, and share-code actions are absent
steps.observed: Live solo showed only board, timer, entry, reveal, and restart controls; no multiplayer join inputs, lobby panels, or share-code actions appeared

evidence.snapshot: Interactive snapshot during live play contained no multiplayer-specific controls.

frictions.description: The Playwright MCP browser instance was locked by another process, so direct Playwright tool use failed with a shared-browser error.
frictions.resolution: Switched to the required agent-browser skill using a dedicated isolated session name for the assigned localhost flow.

summary: Tested 8 assigned desktop home/solo assertions on localhost: all 8 passed with no console errors observed. Evidence was captured under the mission evidence directory using an isolated agent-browser session.
